allow: Bash(xargs -I{} echo "compressed 目录已有 {} 个 .o 文件")

Bash(timeout 15 qemu-system-arm -machine mcimx6ul-evk -m 512M -kernel linux-6.1/arch/arm/boot/zImage -dtb linux-6.1/arch/arm/boot/dts/imx6ul-14x14-evk.dtb -initrd busybox-1.36.1/rootfs.cpio.gz -append "console=ttymxc1,115200 root=/dev/ram rdinit=/sbin/init" -nographic)

Bash(timeout 15 qemu-system-arm -machine mcimx6ul-evk -m 512M -kernel linux-6.1/arch/arm/boot/zImage -dtb linux-6.1/arch/arm/boot/dts/imx6ul-14x14-evk.dtb -initrd busybox-1.36.1/rootfs.cpio.gz -append "console=ttymxc0,115200 earlycon root=/dev/ram rdinit=/sbin/init" -nographic -serial null -serial mon:stdio)

Bash(timeout 10 qemu-system-arm -machine mcimx6ul-evk -m 512M -kernel linux-6.1/arch/arm/boot/zImage -dtb linux-6.1/arch/arm/boot/dts/imx6ul-14x14-evk.dtb -initrd busybox-1.36.1/rootfs.cpio.gz -append "console=ttymxc0,115200 root=/dev/ram rdinit=/sbin/init" -nographic -d unimp)

Bash(timeout 15 qemu-system-arm -machine sabrelite -cpu cortex-a9 -m 512M -kernel linux-6.1/arch/arm/boot/zImage -dtb linux-6.1/arch/arm/boot/dts/imx6q-sabrelite.dtb -initrd busybox-1.36.1/rootfs.cpio.gz -append "console=ttymxc1,115200 root=/dev/ram rdinit=/sbin/init" -nographic -serial null -serial mon:stdio)
